title: Welcome To The Blog
body: This is the new home for updates, small stories, photo notes, breed thoughts, and important reports from Molly and Shaina headquarters.

title: Window Watch Reports
body: Future posts can live here as separate cards, or become their own full pages when a story needs more room.

title: Breed Match Notes
body: Quiz results, favourite breeds, and Molly-coded or Shaina-coded discoveries can become short blog posts here.
